scripts.dev: sh -c 'npm --prefix backend run dev & npm --prefix vite run dev'
scripts.build: npm --prefix vite run build && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix vite run build -- --mode development && npx --prefix backend tsc --noEmit
scripts.deploy:frontend: npm --prefix vite run build && npx wrangler pages deploy vite/dist --project-name openlingo-refactor-cloudflare
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:backend && npm run deploy:frontend
